name: Popcorn with Basil & Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 6 Sun-dried tomatoes, oil cured and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy pot, heat corn oil and olive oil over high heat until the oil smokes.
2. Add 1 kernel of popping corn and heat until it pops.
3. Add split garlic cloves and the rest of the popping corn. Cover the pot and shake gently until the corn starts to pop.
4. Shake vigorously until popping subsides. Remove from heat.
5. Carefully remove the garlic.
6. Toss the popcorn with provolone, tomatoes, oil, salt, and chopped basil.
